description:
A lightweight, developer-focused database management tool. Supports MySQL, PostgreSQL and SQLite. Hackable with plugins. Built for speed, security, and aesthetics.


See the assets to download this version and install.
What's Changed
- [Bug]: MySQL JSON column values shown as NULL in data grid by @midasism in #107
- feat: add support to more postgres types issue#102 by @dev-void-7 in #105
- feat: add MiniMax as first-class AI provider by @octo-patch in #108
New Contributors
- @midasism made their first contribution in #107
- @dev-void-7 made their first contribution in #105
- @octo-patch made their first contribution in #108
Full Changelog: v0.9.11...v0.9.12
